description: Foundation layer: Supabase schema setup with financial_tracker schema and ft_* prefixed views, browser and server Supabase clients, PostgREST view configuration with security_invoker, PWA manifest, and shared utility helpers for date/currency formatting.

subDeliverables.title: Supabase schema setup
subDeliverables.description: Create the financial_tracker PostgreSQL schema on the shared JENG Supabase instance. Set up ft_* prefixed public views that bridge the schema to PostgREST.
acceptanceCriteria: All tables use ft_ prefix in public views
Views are accessible via PostgREST API

subDeliverables.title: Environment variables & Supabase clients
subDeliverables.description: Configure environment variables for Supabase connection. Create browser client with persistSession and server client with cookie-based auth.
acceptanceCriteria: Browser client created with persistSession: true
Server client created with cookie-based session handling
Environment variables configured for Supabase URL and anon key

subDeliverables.title: PostgREST view configuration
subDeliverables.description: Configure all PostgREST views with security_invoker = true to ensure RLS policies are enforced through the view layer.
acceptanceCriteria: All ft_* views use security_invoker = true
RLS policies enforced when querying through views

subDeliverables.title: PWA manifest & favicon
subDeliverables.description: Add PWA manifest.json with app name, icons, theme color, and standalone display mode. Include SVG favicon.
acceptanceCriteria: manifest.json exists with correct app name and display: standalone
App installable as PWA on mobile devices

subDeliverables.title: Utility helpers
subDeliverables.description: Create shared utility functions: format-utils.ts for date/currency formatting, utils.ts for cn() class composition helper.
acceptanceCriteria: formatCurrency supports MXN and USD formats
cn() helper combines clsx and tailwind-merge
